name: Sushi Merge
author: Poki
description: Sushi Merge is a merge game where you create delicious sushi combos! Start with a simple rice ball, then merge identical sushi pieces to craft upgraded, mouth-watering creations. Serve your sushi to hungry customers, earn money, and unlock more space to keep merging. Can you discover every sushi on the menu? How to play Sushi Merge? Click or tap to select an item. Hold and drag it to merge. Who created Sushi Merge? Sushi Merge is created by Kuyi Mobile. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Sushi Merge for free? You can play Sushi Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Sushi Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Sushi Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
